summary: Iter 75 backend contract verified end-to-end: /api/jobs/apply now inserts the applications row first, then deducts 99 credits via _credit_user with meta.label='Job Application – <title> at <company>', then sets credits_charged=99. All 8 backend tests pass (happy path, insufficient credits, already applied, closed job, admin walk-in, incomplete profile, free-pass, +200 job-post reward regression). Frontend testing skipped per request.

insufficient_credits.detail: Insufficient credits. Please add credits to continue applying for this job.

closed_job.detail: Applications Closed. The last date to apply has passed.

admin_walkin.detail: This is an Admin Walk-in & Direct Job. Please contact the recruiter directly using the details on the job page — no in-app application needed.

incomplete_profile.detail_message: Please complete your profile before applying for jobs.

transaction.meta.label: Job Application – CapJob hp at AcmeCorp

contract_checks_verified: applications row inserted BEFORE _credit_user is called (credits_charged starts at 0, then flipped to 99)
transactions row: reason='job_application', delta=-99, meta.label starts with 'Job Application – ' and contains title + company
meta.job_id, meta.cost, meta.application_id also present in transaction
Insufficient credits (402): no applications row, no transaction, wallet unchanged
Already applied (400): only one applications row and one transaction after 2 calls (no double charge)
Closed job (400, 'Applications Closed. The last date to apply has passed.'): no applications row, no transaction
Admin walk-in (400, 'This is an Admin Walk-in & Direct Job. …'): no applications row, no transaction
Incomplete profile (400, structured {code:'PROFILE_INCOMPLETE', message, missing_fields[]}): no side effects
Free-pass (200, used_free=true): credits_charged=0, no transaction inserted, users.free_uses_left decremented to 0, credits untouched
+200 job_post_reward fires exactly once when 4 fresh students apply to a pro-posted job (idempotency via posting_reward_paid flag)
action_items: No backend fixes required. Frontend regex matchers on the rejection detail strings should key on: 'Insufficient credits', exact 'Already applied', 'Applications Closed', 'Admin Walk-in', and the structured PROFILE_INCOMPLETE code (already wired per review_request).
critical_code_review_comments: Rollback path in routers/jobs.py apply_job (L534-553) is correct: except → applications.delete_one({id: app_doc.id}) then re-raise. However, since _credit_user in server.py only does a single find_one_and_update + insert_one, real-world failure surface for the try-block is narrow (Mongo down, disk full). No compensating logic beyond delete_one exists — if _credit_user succeeds but the subsequent update to credits_charged fails, the transaction row would exist with meta.application_id but the applications row would be deleted. Consider ordering: update credits_charged BEFORE _credit_user, or use motor's transaction session. Non-blocking for this iteration.

student_missing_fields still requires is_email_verified for students — signup path already flips this on verify-otp, so behaviour is consistent, but incomplete-profile 400 currently omits 'Verify Email Address' from missing_fields when the user hasn't verified email (because require_role passes only after login, and login pre-req is unclear). Not covered by this iter.
seed_data_creation: All test data is disposable and created inline in the test module via _make_complete_student / _make_pro / _post_verified_job helpers. Nothing persisted needing cleanup outside the test-generated referme.io / acmecorp.io emails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter75_apply_credit_rollback.py covers all 8 apply-endpoint cases in ~22s. Helpers _make_complete_student / _make_pro / _post_verified_job in that file are the fastest way to spin up a profile-complete student + a phone-verified pro + a verified open job without going through the OTP + PUT /profile dance. Direct DB writes are used to bypass profile completeness UX flow.
rca_of_issue: No bug found. Refactor from Iter 75 (insert-first, deduct-later, rollback on failure, meta.label on wallet txn) is correctly implemented in /app/backend/routers/jobs.py apply_job (L482+). All contract clauses verified via pytest.
